task_title: Prove the first live PCC control loop
task_objective: Have Claude Code complete one small bounded repo task that directly exercises the PCC loop: read current state and directive, produce a worker result with evidence, and allow honest verifier PASS or retry without owner restatement.
completion_criteria: A single bounded repo artifact is created or updated within allowed scope.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.
The verifier can determine PASS, FAIL, INSUFFICIENT, BLOCKED, or OUT_OF_SCOPE from the returned evidence.
The task directly exercises the PCC control loop rather than only describing it.

allowed: Create one bounded proof artifact inside .cockpit.
Update docs directly related to the worker proof task.
Define the worker return path and expected evidence format.
forbidden: Do not build app code yet.
Do not add paid API dependencies.
Do not introduce broad orchestration or automation.
Do not change canonical project goals or verification verdicts.
Do not require the owner to manually restate or carry the worker instructions.

required_evidence: Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched.
next_action: Run the first live PCC control-loop proof task and capture the returned result file for verification.
